creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 202937
wmsun-1.05.patch

Hi Marco,

thank you for the patch. It took a while because some preparations had to be made. To keep it short:

- The 1.12 of astro/wmsun was an unofficial fork and that source has vanished now.
- The official upstream repository has a new home at: https://github.com/window-maker/dockapps/ (or https://www.dockapps.net/)
- The latest, official version of astro/wmsun is 1.05, so the patch "upgrades" it from 1.12 to 1.05.

The changelog can be retrieved at: https://github.com/window-maker/dockapps/blob/master/wmsun/ChangeLog

If this patch is ok for you, can you please approve it by setting the "?" flag to "+"?

Don't hesitate to ask if there any questions.
